title: Specify WorkspaceModel (v1)
description: Deterministic, versioned snapshot of project facts produced by `specrun lint` for the `WorkspaceModel` schema. Persistence and query reserve: `.specify/cache/workspace-model.v1.json` is reserved as the future v2 persistence location; `specrun model query <selector>` is reserved as a future read-only CLI verb. v1 ships `--dump-model` only.

version.description: `WorkspaceModel`: version discriminant. Breaking indexer output bumps the version; v1 pins the shape defined by this schema.

project_dir.description: `WorkspaceModel` extraction inputs: scan root (consumer project or framework repo). Typically the project root absolute path; relative `.` is accepted for tests and ephemeral scans.

scan_profile.description: `WorkspaceModel` extraction inputs: controls which extractors run. `consumer` is the only Phase 2 profile; `framework` is reserved for a future framework scan.

artifact_paths.description: `WorkspaceModel` extraction inputs: optional narrow list. Empty array means the indexer performs a full profile-specific scan by the file scan contract.

languages.description: `WorkspaceModel` extraction inputs: optional language tokens supplied by caller or inferred from paths.

files.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `file` facts produced by the filesystem walk.

frontmatter.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `frontmatter` facts from markdown `---` block extraction plus YAML parse.

markdown_sections.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `markdown_section` facts from the markdown structure pass.

markdown_links.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `markdown_link` facts from the fence-aware link scan.

symlinks.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `symlink` facts; recorded but not traversed by the file scan contract.

rule_index.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `rule_index` facts from rules tree discovery (reuses the rule frontmatter parser).

text_matches.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `text_match` facts from the optional precomputed regex index.

ignore_directives.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `ignore_directive` facts from the indexer pass that recognises `specify-ignore: <RULE-ID> â€” <rationale>` comments across the closed comment-style list. Optional in v1 envelopes until the indexer extractor lands; consumers MUST tolerate the field's absence.

briefs.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `brief` facts from `adapters/**/briefs/*.md` under the framework scan profile (Â§F1). Optional in v1 envelopes; absent under the consumer profile so the consumer wire shape is unchanged.

agent_teams.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `agent_team` facts from followed `agent-teams.md` symlinks under the framework scan profile (Â§F1). Optional in v1 envelopes; absent under the consumer profile so the consumer wire shape is unchanged.

relativePath.description: `WorkspaceModel` stability: paths are project-relative with forward slashes.

sha256Hex.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 digest (64 lowercase hex characters).

kind.description: `WorkspaceModel` file scan: `binary` when the first 8 KiB contains a NUL byte; otherwise `text`.

language.description: Optional language token inferred from extension or supplied by the caller.

sha256.description: Optional content digest; populated when extractors need cross-file identity (e.g. `agent_teams` canonical SHA check).

schema-id.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: optional schema id the frontmatter declares (matches the registered-schema token shape from the registered-schema token shape).

fields.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: parsed YAML field map. Per-key shape is rule-specific; the model holds the raw value tree.

title.description: Heading text after the leading `#`s, with surrounding whitespace trimmed.

line-start.description: 1-based line of the heading line itself.

line-end.description: 1-based last line that belongs to this section (the line before the next same-or-higher-level heading, or the file's last line).

body-line-count.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: number of non-heading body lines under the section.

from-path.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: path of the markdown file containing the link.

to-raw.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: verbatim link target as authored (relative path, URL, or anchor).

resolves.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: optional; `true` when the target resolves on disk, `false` for broken/dangling references. Absent for off-tree URLs the indexer did not attempt to resolve.

target.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: symlink target as recorded by the filesystem (may be relative or absolute).

broken.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `true` when the link target does not exist on disk.

resolved-target.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: project-relative path of the resolved canonical endpoint after symlink traversal. Populated only by the framework scan profile (Â§F1 follow mode); absent under the consumer profile and absent when the target resolves outside the project tree or could not be canonicalised.

name.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: skill name (matches the `name:` frontmatter field).

plugin.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: owning plugin slug (the directory under `plugins/`).

frontmatter-ref.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: path back to the originating `frontmatter` fact so consumers can join through the frontmatter table.

body-line-count.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: number of non-frontmatter body lines under the skill body. Populated by the framework scan profile; absent under the consumer profile.

adapter.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: owning adapter slug (the directory under `adapters/{sources,targets}/`).

operation.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: operation slug for the brief (e.g. `extract`, `survey`, `shape`, `build`, `merge`).

sections.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `##` heading titles found in the body, in document order after fence and HTML-comment stripping.

body-line-count.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: total non-empty markdown body lines (frontmatter excluded when present).

path.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: project-relative path of the `agent-teams.md` symlink itself.

target-raw.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: symlink target as recorded by `read_link` (may be relative or absolute, possibly outside the project tree).

resolved-target.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: project-relative path of the resolved canonical endpoint when it lives under `project_dir`; absent when the target resolves outside the tree or could not be canonicalised.

target-sha256.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: hex-encoded SHA-256 of the resolved target file's bytes. Absent when the target is unreadable or broken.

axis.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: `sources` xor `targets` (the on-disk parent directory under `adapters/`).

version.description: Optional manifest version; absent when the adapter does not pin one.

brief-keys.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: operation slugs declared as the `briefs:` map keys in the manifest body. Empty / absent when the manifest omits the field. Consumed by the `kind: set-coverage` interpreter (`adapter-briefs-cover-operations` source discriminator).

path-in-manifest.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: JSON-pointer-style location inside `marketplace.json` where the entry was discovered.

rule-id.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: rule id (matches the rule schema's `id` regex).

origin.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: which rules tree contributed the rule (target adapter, source adapter, shared universal tree, core rules pack, or `unknown` for cache files whose path does not match a recognized adapter shape).

frontmatter-ref.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: path back to the originating `frontmatter` fact so consumers can join through the frontmatter table.

pattern-id.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: stable identifier for the precomputed regex pattern that produced this match.

path.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: project-relative path of the file containing the directive comment.

line.description: 1-based line of the directive comment itself.

rule-id.description: `WorkspaceModel` entity: rule id named by the directive (matches the rule schema's `id` regex; not pattern-pinned here so malformed directives can still surface as `UNI-022` / `UNI-023` candidates).

rationale.description: Verbatim rationale text from the directive comment. Absent when the directive was malformed (missing or empty rationale); the directive-validation pass emits `UNI-022` in that case.

target-line.description: 1-based line the directive applies to. Inline trailing directives target their own line; block-leading directives target the next non-blank, non-comment line.

raw.description: Raw directive comment text as captured by the indexer, including delimiters; used by formatters that surface the original source spelling.
